game_info.title: Neon White - Speedrunning FPS
game_info.concept:
Neon White is a single-player speedrunning FPS where you can sacrifice your guns for godlike parkour moves. Neon White is a lightning fast first-person action game about exterminating demons in Heaven. You are White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven. The other assassins seem familiar, though…

Features:

• You play as Neon White, an assassin plucked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a shot at redemption.



• Collect “Soul Cards” to attack your foes or discard them to use unique movement abilities.



• Compete for the best times by cleverly combining cards to discover massive shortcuts.



• Uncover Heaven’s mysteries by getting to know the other assassins… did you know them in a past life?
game_info.description: You are Neon White, an assassin competing in Heaven's demon-slaying trials. Race through neon-lit obstacle courses, eliminating demons to reach the goal portal. Collect Soul Cards that function as weapons - use them to shoot demons or discard them for powerful parkour abilities like double jumps, dashes, and grapples. Master the art of card management to find the fastest routes and achieve the best completion times. Each level is a test of your speed, precision, and strategic thinking.
game_info.controls:
W/Up Arrow: Move Forward
A/Left Arrow: Strafe Left
S/Down Arrow: Move Backward
D/Right Arrow: Strafe Right
Space: Jump (or use Soul Card ability)
Shift: Sprint
Z: Shoot current weapon
Mouse Movement: Look around (WASD + Mouse for FPS control)
1-3 Number Keys: Switch between collected Soul Cards
ENTER: Start Game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart Level

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic player movement and navigation through the level. This ensures the first-person controls work correctly and the player can traverse the basic platforming elements without using special abilities.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move forward continuously using W key, occasionally strafing left and right. Jump over obstacles using Space. Navigate around platforms and avoid falling off edges. Test basic collision detection with platforms and walls.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should smoothly move through the level, jump successfully, collide properly with platforms, and maintain stable first-person camera movement. Movement should feel responsive and collision detection should prevent falling through platforms.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing Soul Card collection, weapon usage, and demon elimination. This verifies that the core combat mechanics work - picking up cards, shooting demons, and the discard-for-ability system.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate toward Soul Card pickups to collect them. Use Z key to shoot at demons when a card is equipped. Press Space while holding a card to discard it for the special ability (double jump, dash, etc.). Eliminate all demons in the level.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Soul Cards should be collectible and visible in HUD. Shooting should eliminate demons on hit. Discarding cards should trigger special movement abilities. All demons should be eliminatable, and score should increase with each kill.
TEST_2.description: Testing Soul Card collection, weapon usage, and demon elimination. This verifies that the core combat mechanics work - picking up cards, shooting demons, and the discard-for-ability system.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing the parkour abilities granted by discarding Soul Cards. Each card type should provide a unique movement ability like double jump, air dash, or grapple hook to reach otherwise inaccessible areas.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Collect different types of Soul Cards. Discard them using Space to activate their abilities mid-air or during movement. Try chaining abilities together (double jump + dash). Attempt to reach elevated platforms using these abilities.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Each discarded card should grant its unique ability immediately. Double jump should allow a second jump in mid-air. Dash should propel player forward rapidly. Grapple should pull player toward targets. Abilities should enable reaching high platforms.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing the speedrunning timer system and level completion. The game should track time from start to reaching the goal portal, and display the completion time on the win screen.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Play through a complete level from start to finish. Rush toward the goal portal as quickly as possible, using optimal movement and card abilities. Reach the glowing goal portal to complete the level.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Timer should start when gameplay begins and stop when reaching the goal portal. Completion time should be displayed on the win screen. Game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Best time should be tracked if playing multiple times.
TEST_4.description: Testing the speedrunning timer system and level completion. The game should track time from start to reaching the goal portal, and display the completion time on the win screen.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing the lose condition when falling off the level or failing to survive. The player should respawn or see game over if they fall into the void below the platforms.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Intentionally walk or jump off the edge of platforms to fall into the void. Test what happens when player Y position goes below a certain threshold. Check if there's a respawn mechanic or immediate game over.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Falling below a certain Y threshold should trigger either a respawn at the last checkpoint/start position or transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Player should not fall infinitely. Clear feedback should be given about the failure state.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing enemy AI behavior and combat interaction. Demons should patrol or move in patterns, detect the player, and pose a threat that requires the player to use Soul Cards to eliminate them.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Observe demon movement patterns without engaging. Get close to demons to see if they react. Test shooting demons from different distances and angles. Try to eliminate all demons in a level efficiently.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Demons should have clear movement patterns or patrol routes. They should be visible and distinguishable from other objects. Projectiles from Soul Cards should hit and eliminate demons. Score should increase with each demon killed.
TEST_6.description: Testing enemy AI behavior and combat interaction. Demons should patrol or move in patterns, detect the player, and pose a threat that requires the player to use Soul Cards to eliminate them.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing the card switching system and inventory management. Player should be able to hold multiple Soul Cards and switch between them using number keys, with clear visual feedback about current card.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Collect multiple different Soul Card types. Press number keys 1, 2, 3 to switch between collected cards. Check HUD for visual indication of current card. Test if switching works during movement and in mid-air.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Number keys should switch to the corresponding card slot. HUD should clearly show which card is active. Switching should be instant and work in all game states. Empty slots should be indicated visually. Current card's ability should be available immediately after switching.
